prompt: Review PR #4495 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds an RC subscription bridge between the tracer and the OpenFeature provider.

assertions.text: Flags that forwardingCallback and/or AttachCallback invoke external callbacks while holding rcState.Lock
Notes that rcState is not reset when the tracer stops and restarts
Flags ResetForTest or similar test helpers in non-test files
Notes duplicated FFE product name or env var string across packages
Flags that error/warn messages should describe impact (what the user loses)
